title: 7 fixes — Push-Accept deep link, OTA battery, coin cross-account leak, alert→toast (12 sites)
notes: FIX: Tapping 'Accept' on a lock-screen call notification (when app is fully closed) now opens the ringing modal instead of doing nothing silently. Was a hoisting bug where the direct-accept path was always undefined.
FIX: OTA update check now skips when the app is backgrounded (Capacitor WebView persists across pause). Saves battery + bandwidth during long-idle periods on Android.

PRIVACY FIX: Coin balance from a previous user signing out no longer leaks into the next user's CallScreen on the same device. Was caused by a legacy global cache key getting written on every coin change.

FIX: Microphone-error and audio-publish-error alerts in calls replaced with non-blocking toasts — was blocking the JS thread mid-WebRTC handshake on Android, and pausing iOS PWA AudioContext (which could kill the next call's audio session).

FIX: 12 user-facing native alert() dialogs replaced with in-app toasts — profile image validation (file type / size 5MB), profile save errors, restrict/unrestrict feedback, account deletion confirmation, OTA update check results. CLAUDE.md explicitly banned native dialogs (they block JS thread + look out-of-place on Android).
FIX: User display names that contain only non-string types (e.g. corrupted profile.full_name as number) no longer crash the Moments viewer or chat menu. Added String() coercion before .split().
FIX: Hardware back button from any top-level tab (Search/Profile/Wallet/Messages) now always goes home. Was sometimes landing in Anonymous Connect screen if you'd previously tapped the connect orb.
